titleStmt.title: SII 4.936: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 936. (A.R. No. 119 of 1893). ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE SOUTHERN ENCLOSURE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . śākābdē trikarābdhisōmasahitē śrīnaṁdanākhyē samē grāmē
yēnmadalē prasiddhamakarōtkī¨rttipratāpōdayaḥ . śrīmanmallaya
cinnabommanṛpatiḥ śrīvīrabhadrēśituḥ prāsādaṁ mukhamaṁḍḍapa
ṁ parivṛtaprākāramātārakaṁ [. 1*] guṇabāṇagaticaṁdragaṇanaṁ
bu śālivāhanaśakava¨rṣaṁbu lavaniyaṁddu . ṁbaragu naṁda
na bhādrapada śuddhadaśamini sōmavāramunāṁḍu prēma
tōḍa . nenamadalavīranna kiravugāṁ brākāramunu bhōgarā
gaṁbu lanuvupaṟace (.) tana nādhu(ṁ)ḍayyapadaṁḍanāyaku
naku puṇyaṁbugā nannibudhulu vogaḍa . tāratārakamaṁdā
raśāradābhra(.)tuhinahimakaravikhyātinaharahaṁbu .
gelucu satkī¨rtidhanamu dā mela(ṁ)ganē¨rcu . mallanaranādhu cinabommama
nujavibhu(ṁ)ḍu [. 2] ¤cinna pommunāyakkar kaṭṭivitta piṟakāra[m .*]¤
svasti [*] śrījayābhyudayaśālivā
hanaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1453 Agunē
ṁṭi naṁdanasaṁvatsara bhādrapada śu
ddha 10 sō . nāṁḍu rāyasaṁ A
yyaparusayyavāru koṁḍḍavī
ṭi siṁhāsanamu pāliṁcaṁgā
nu Āyana sēvakuṁḍu cinabo
mmānāyaṁḍu vīrēśvaruniki prā
kāramukhamaṁṭavamulu sa
ma¨rpiṁcenu . Āyana maṟaṁdi
bāṇāla vīraya padakamu sama
¨rpaṇa .
śrīcinabommānāyaṁḍu vīrēśvaruniki sāgiṁcina bhōgarāgālu Amṛtapaḷlu
modalaina dha¨rmamunnusthānamānyālunnu yavvaru sāgiṁturu vāri pādālu
mā talamīṁda nuṁḍḍunu Ani cinabommaya kuṭuṁbasamētuṁḍai sēvasēstunnāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 4.936 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
